scripts.ci:quality: pnpm --filter @gorola/shared build && pnpm security:audit && pnpm db:test:prepare && pnpm lint --max-warnings 0 && pnpm typecheck && pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm --filter @gorola/web test:e2e --reporter=list
scripts.ci:prisma: pnpm --filter @gorola/api exec prisma generate && pnpm --filter @gorola/api exec prisma migrate deploy

_pnpm_overrides_comments.ip-address: Overridden due to moderate security vulnerability in <=10.1.0
_pnpm_overrides_comments.hono: Overridden due to moderate security vulnerabilities (JWT scheme bypass, HTML injection, percent-encoded path routing) in <4.12.21, and high vulnerability (CORS reflecting wildcard origin with credentials) in <4.12.25
_pnpm_overrides_comments.fast-uri: Overridden due to high security vulnerability (path traversal) in <=3.1.0
_pnpm_overrides_comments.@opentelemetry/sdk-node: Overridden due to high security vulnerability (DoS/Process crash) in <0.217.0
_pnpm_overrides_comments.@opentelemetry/exporter-prometheus: Overridden due to high security vulnerability (DoS/Process crash) in <0.217.0
_pnpm_overrides_comments.@opentelemetry/core: Overridden due to moderate security vulnerability (unbounded memory allocation in W3C Baggage propagation) in <2.8.0
_pnpm_overrides_comments.protobufjs: Overridden due to high security vulnerabilities (DoS/recursion in <=7.5.5, DoS unbounded Any expansion in <=7.6.0) — requires >=7.6.1
_pnpm_overrides_comments.@protobufjs/utf8: Overridden due to moderate security vulnerability (overlong UTF-8) in <=1.1.0
_pnpm_overrides_comments.minimatch@10>brace-expansion: Overridden due to moderate security vulnerability (DoS) in <5.0.6
_pnpm_overrides_comments.ws: Overridden due to high security vulnerability (memory exhaustion DoS from tiny fragments) in <8.21.0
_pnpm_overrides_comments.qs: Overridden due to moderate security vulnerability (remotely triggerable DoS) in <=6.15.2
_pnpm_overrides_comments.axios: Overridden due to high security vulnerabilities (NO_PROXY bypass CVE-2025-62718, MitM via prototype pollution) in <1.16.0
_pnpm_overrides_comments.vitest: Overridden due to critical security vulnerability (arbitrary file read/execution in Vitest UI server) in <4.1.0
_pnpm_overrides_comments.zod: Overridden to ensure single Zod version across workspace and resolve react-hook-form type mismatches in hoisted linker mode
_pnpm_overrides_comments.react-router: Overridden due to high security vulnerability (DoS via path expansion) in <7.15.0
_pnpm_overrides_comments.react-router-dom: Overridden due to high security vulnerability (DoS via path expansion) in <7.15.0
_pnpm_overrides_comments.xlsx: Overridden due to high security vulnerabilities (Prototype Pollution, ReDoS) in <0.20.2
_pnpm_overrides_comments.@grpc/grpc-js: Overridden due to high security vulnerabilities (server crash, malformed compression message crash) in <1.14.4
_pnpm_overrides_comments.esbuild: Overridden due to high security vulnerability (remote code execution via NPM_CONFIG_REGISTRY in Deno module) in <0.28.1
_pnpm_overrides_comments.form-data: Overridden due to high security vulnerability (CRLF injection via unescaped multipart field names/filenames, GHSA-hmw2-7cc7-3qxx) in <4.0.6
_pnpm_overrides_comments.js-yaml: Overridden due to moderate security vulnerability (quadratic-complexity DoS via merge key repeated aliases, GHSA-h67p-54hq-rp68) in <=4.1.1
_pnpm_overrides_comments.@babel/core: Overridden due to low security vulnerability (arbitrary file read via sourceMappingURL comment, GHSA-4x5r-pxfx-6jf8) in <=7.29.0
